issues.description: Card has complex conditional effect text but effects array is empty. Should contain: Trigger=OnAttacked (or removal effect context), Condition=LeaderHasType{The Seven Warlords of the Sea}, Action=ReturnToHand or custom return-to-deck mechanic with character selection restriction
Missing trigger for 'would be removed from the field by opponent's effect' - likely Counter or defensive trigger needed
Action should return a character (other than Gecko Moria) to bottom of deck - ReturnToHand exists but 'bottom of deck' placement is non-standard and requires special handling
Missing condition: LeaderHasType with value 'The Seven Warlords of the Sea'

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Once Per Turn] If your Leader has the {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type and this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may place 1 of your Characters other than [Gecko Moria] at the bottom of the owner's deck instead.

conditions.value: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
